name: Passover Beet Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh beets, boil them until tender, then peel and grate on a large grater.
2. If using shoestring beets, skip the boiling step.
3. In a saucepan, bring sugar and honey to a rolling boil over medium heat.
4. Add grated beets, lemon juice, and lemon rind to the hot sugar mixture. Stir well.
5. Cook the mixture for 30 minutes until it thickens.
6. Gradually add ginger, stirring constantly until the preserves reach your desired consistency (about 30 more minutes).
7. Remove from heat and stir in the blanched, shredded almonds. Stir for an additional 5 minutes to ensure even distribution of the almonds.
This recipe retains all original ingredients and steps while improving clarity and consistency.
